hero.subtitle: Join DSB KKC (Dnyaneshwar Barate's Academy) to experience premium academic tutoring and life-changing skill programs like Abacus, Vedic Maths, and Robotics.

notices.title: New Batches Starting Soon!
notices.desc: Fresh batches for Abacus (Level 1), Vedic Maths, and Robotics are starting from Monday. Limited seats available. Contact office to reserve.

notices.title: Free Handwriting & Rubik's Cube Workshop
notices.desc: A special 2-hour free workshop is organized this Saturday at 10:00 AM. Open for kids aged 6-15. Registration is compulsory.

notices.title: Regular Academic Tuitions Admission Open
notices.desc: Admissions are actively open for school tuitions (1st to 10th Standard) for all subjects. Daily batches, weekly mock tests.

highlights.title: Designed to Deliver Educational Excellence
highlights.subtitle: We focus on building strong cognitive bases and academic foundations for children. Here is what makes us different.

items.title: Experienced Teachers
items.desc: Learn from highly trained subject experts, personally mentored and guided by founder Dnyaneshwar Barate.

items.title: Practical Learning
items.desc: We believe in hands-on learning. Robotics kits, math tools, and interactive conversations drive our modules.

items.title: Affordable Fees
items.desc: Premium training made accessible. We offer top-tier education with flexible, affordable installment payment plans.

items.title: Small Batch Sizes
items.desc: Maximum 15 students per batch. This allows personal attention, regular assessments, and tailored pace for every kid.

whyUs.title: Empowering Kids Beyond the Textbooks
whyUs.subtitle: At DSB KKC, we don't just focus on school curriculum grades. We focus on enhancing brain power, improving communication confidence, and introducing children to cutting-edge skills.
whyUs.readMore: Read more about our teaching philosophy

items.title: Holistic Brain Development
items.desc: Our Abacus and Vedic Maths programs trigger left-right brain synchronization, improving spatial reasoning and photographic memory.

items.title: Modern STEM Exposure
items.desc: Robotics classes spark engineering interest early on, teaching concepts of mechanics, electronics, and algorithms.

items.title: Academic Focus
items.desc: Tuition programs follow rigorous concept clearing, revision loops, weekly mock tests, and systematic problem analysis.

featuredCourses.title: Featured Academy Programs
featuredCourses.subtitle: Explore our structured course tracks designed for children from preschool to high school.

items.title: Abacus Brain Development
items.desc: A globally recognized system to speed up arithmetic calculations, improve focus, and develop spatial and mental visual memory in kids.

items.title: Robotics for Kids
items.desc: An engaging STEM course introducing kids to mechanical assembly, electronic sensor logic, and basic robot programming.

items.title: 1st to 10th Tuitions
items.desc: Comprehensive school academic support covering Math, Science, English, and Social Studies. Tailored for CBSE & State Boards.

testimonials.title: What Our Parents & Students Say
testimonials.readAll: Read all parent reviews & submit your feedback

items.name: Meera Deshmukh
items.text: Enrolling Aarav in the Abacus course at DSB KKC was the best decision. His math anxiety has completely disappeared, and he can solve complex additions mentally in seconds! The personal attention here is unmatched.

items.name: Rajesh Kulkarni
items.text: Tanvi attended the English Speaking and Vedic Maths courses. Her speaking confidence has skyrocketed, and her school grades have improved dramatically. Dnyaneshwar Sir and the team are exceptional educators.

items.name: Sneha Patil
items.text: The Robotics course here is so practical. Kabir loves assembling the kits and learning basic programming. It is not just rote learning; they actually teach scientific logic and critical thinking.

items.q: What is the right age to enroll children in the Abacus program?
items.a: The ideal age for Abacus is between 5 and 14 years. This is the period of maximum brain development, and training at this age boosts memory, visualization, and concentration skills effectively.

items.q: Do you offer demo classes for new students?
items.a: Yes, we offer 1 free trial/demo class for Abacus, Vedic Maths, and Robotics. This allows parents and students to experience our teaching methodology before committing to a full course.

items.q: How do Vedic Maths techniques benefit students?
items.a: Vedic Maths provides speed calculation techniques that help students solve math problems 10-15 times faster. It is highly beneficial for school exams, scholarship tests, and competitive examinations.

items.q: Are tuition classes aligned with CBSE and State Board syllabi?
items.a: Yes! Our tuition classes for 1st to 10th standard cover State Board, CBSE, and ICSE syllabi. We focus on concept clarity, regular tests, and thorough exam preparation.

items.q: What is the student-to-teacher ratio in a batch?
items.a: To ensure personal attention, we keep our batch sizes small. The maximum number of students per batch is limited to 15, allowing teachers to address each child's individual learning needs.

cta.title: Ready to Give Your Child an Academic Edge?
cta.subtitle: Book a free counseling and demo class session with Dnyaneshwar Sir. Let's discuss how we can partner to help your child excel.
cta.noCard: No credit card required. Trial sessions are completely free of charge.

about.heroSubtitle: A decade of transforming young minds with skills, knowledge, and confidence.
about.founderRole: Founder & Head Educator, DSB KKC Academy
about.founderQuote: Every child is a genius waiting to be unlocked. At DSB KKC, we don't just teach—we inspire, guide, and nurture each student's unique potential. Our mission is to bridge the gap between traditional schooling and the real-world skills children need to thrive.
about.founderBody: With over a decade of experience in education, I founded DSB KKC with a simple belief: every student deserves access to premium, skill-focused education regardless of their background. From our humble beginnings in Katraj, Pune, we have grown into a trusted institution that has impacted over 2,500 young learners.
about.missionText: To provide holistic, affordable, and high-quality education that empowers students academically, cognitively, and personally — preparing them for the challenges of the 21st century.
about.visionText: To become the most trusted educational academy in Pune, recognized for producing confident, capable, and compassionate learners who contribute meaningfully to society.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We set high standards in teaching quality, curriculum design, and student outcomes.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: We build trust through transparency, honesty, and ethical practices in all our operations.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We embrace modern methods—robotics, digital tools, and research-backed techniques.

values.title: Inclusivity
values.desc: Our doors are open to every child, with flexible fees and personalized learning plans.

values.title: Community
values.desc: We believe strong partnerships with parents and the local community drive student success.

values.title: Passion
values.desc: Our educators genuinely love teaching and celebrate every milestone with students.

about.whyTrustTitle: Why Thousands of Parents Trust Us

whyTrustItems.title: Certified Expert Faculty
whyTrustItems.desc: All teachers are domain-certified and regularly attend professional training workshops.

whyTrustItems.title: Proven Track Record
whyTrustItems.desc: 2,500+ students mentored. Multiple State & National Abacus competition winners from our academy.

whyTrustItems.title: Safe & Supportive Environment
whyTrustItems.desc: Child-safe classrooms with CCTV monitoring, strict attendance, and regular parent-teacher interactions.

whyTrustItems.title: Flexible Batch Timings
whyTrustItems.desc: Morning, afternoon, and evening batches to suit every family's schedule.

whyTrustItems.title: Regular Progress Reports
whyTrustItems.desc: Monthly assessments with detailed progress cards shared with parents after every test cycle.

whyTrustItems.title: Direct Founder Involvement
whyTrustItems.desc: Dnyaneshwar Sir is actively involved in curriculum design, quality checks, and student mentoring daily.
